rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase

background_layers.name: Gradient Field
background_layers.implementation: Fixed inset-0 div with absolute positioned radial gradients. Colors: violet-500/20, cyan-500/20. Apply blur-[120px]. Animate slowly using framer-motion.

background_layers.name: Neural Grid & Particles
background_layers.implementation: react-tsparticles canvas covering the viewport. Settings: linked lines (opacity 0.15, color #06B6D4), particles (size 1-2, color #8B5CF6), slow organic movement, mouse hover interaction (repel or grab). This creates the engineered, living digital universe feel.

background_layers.name: Energy Waves
background_layers.implementation: Absolute divs with repeating linear gradients or soft pink/violet noise textures on mix-blend-mode overlay to simulate frequency distortions.

background_layers.name: Core Pulse
background_layers.implementation: Central absolute element behind Hero text. Emits framer-motion expanding rings (scale 1 to 3, opacity 1 to 0) infinitely. Border color: #8B5CF6. Represents the heartbeat of Astreon.

visual_system.mouse_parallax: Wrap the main page content in a Framer Motion container that tracks mouse position and slightly translates the UI (x/y by -10px to 10px) inversely to the mouse, enhancing the 3D depth against the particle background.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center relative z-40
sections.elements: Giant 'ASTREON' typography with bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-400 via-cyan-400 to-pink-400. Subtitle in monospace 'A LIVING DIGITAL UNIVERSE'. Primary CTA button with glassmorphism + inner neon glow. Core pulse anchored right behind the text.

sections.name: About
sections.elements: Grid cols 12. Left column (col-span-12 md:col-span-5) features the developer portrait with a soft violet overlay to maintain mystery. Right column (col-span-12 md:col-span-7) contains glassmorphism cards detailing background, mission, and the 'Astreon Core' intelligence.

sections.name: Projects
sections.elements: Staggered grid of glass cards. Each project card has an abstract tech image. Hovering over a card triggers a border color transition to secondary (cyan) and slightly scales the image.

sections.name: Skills
sections.elements: Background features a large kinetic marquee (very slow, low contrast text 'SYSTEM_PROTOCOLS // NEURAL_NODES'). Foreground contains floating glassmorphism badges displaying technical skills.

sections.name: Contact
sections.elements: A centered glassmorphism 'Control Panel' form. Inputs must have Shadcn UI logic but stripped down to pure minimalist borders (border-b only or subtle rounded rectangles with focus:ring-violet-500).

images.description: A striking studio portrait of a woman illuminated by neon lights, used in the About section to represent the mysterious creator.
Abstract swirling purple metallic texture for project card 1.
Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape for project card 2.
Abstract streaks of light on a dark background for project card 3.
HTML code displayed on a screen for project card 4.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for the core pulse and particles.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: You are working with .js files, NOT .tsx files. Write all React components in pure JavaScript (.jsx/.js). Implement the multi-layer depth system exactly as described in visual_system.background_layers. Ensure layers z-index correctly (0 to 30) behind the content (z-40+). Use glassmorphism heavily (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5` or `bg-[#030014]/40` with `border-white/10`) for all cards. Use react-tsparticles for the neural grid. Create a custom framer-motion component for the 'Core Pulse' (expanding rings). Strictly adhere to the electric violet, cyan, and deep void black color palette. Ensure the website has a calm but alive feel.
